node.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Niagara Falls") on Niagara Falls Day Trip (Score: 0.51)

node.name: YYZ Departure
node.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

node.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
node.description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.

node.name: Harbourfront Stroll
node.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

node.name: Full-Day Workshop
node.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.
